selections.name: Tasting
selections.reason: Consistent performer coming off a strong third-place finish at this track and distance. Ready to find peak form.

selections.name: Peptide Plata
selections.reason: Third-up today and ready to peak after a solid fourth over this course and distance last start.

selections.name: Love Me Again
selections.reason: Deserves another chance after a fair fifth-place run here last time. Capable of improvement.

selections.name: Win Prime
selections.reason: Can easily finish right over the top of these if the pace is genuine early.

danger_horse.name: God Sure Win
danger_horse.reason: Capable of a big finish and shouldn't be written off at double-digit odds.

selections.name: Go Go Mango
selections.reason: Excellent third over this track and distance last start. Likely to prove very hard to hold out here.

selections.name: Gluck (USA)
selections.reason: Comes off a short let-up. Solid fourth last time out and further improvement is expected.

selections.name: Enfleurage
selections.reason: Nicely placed to bounce back from a wide draw. Has shown enough ability to feature.

selections.name: Friday Then
selections.reason: Progressing well with a good third last start. A win is on the cards soon.

danger_horse.name: Lunenburg
danger_horse.reason: Better than recent ordinary performances suggest and could surprise.

selections.name: Cosmo Amadeus
selections.reason: Superb second last start over this track and distance. Progressing well and looks the one to beat.

selections.name: Teleos Hina
selections.reason: Excellent second last start after leading from a wide gate. Major threat if she finds the front easily.

selections.name: Insalata
selections.reason: Watch for sharp improvement after a solid prep. Fitter now and can challenge.

selections.name: Queen Of Heart
selections.reason: Likely to measure up again after a strong second-place effort last start.

danger_horse.name: Tomorrowin Ask
danger_horse.reason: Nice draw and worth thought after a solid third last time out.

selections.name: Alcor
selections.reason: Two-year-old filly making her debut. Highly regarded in training and likely to measure up.

selections.name: Gold Master
selections.reason: First-starter by Mischevious Alex who has shown speed in trials. Should be the focus of attention.

selections.name: K's Velocity
selections.reason: First-starter by Chrysoberyl. Respect any positive market lead as the stable is confident.

selections.name: Angel Ring
selections.reason: First-starter who looks sure to measure up based on encouraging morning workouts.

danger_horse.name: Teruken Yumi Roman
danger_horse.reason: Bold showing expected on debut from this well-bred individual.

selections.name: Jeanie
selections.reason: Ideally placed to make it two wins on the trot. Class of the field and the clear top selection.

selections.name: Media Punta
selections.reason: Has the ability to be right in the finish. Solid winning record over this track and distance.

selections.name: Ashoka
selections.reason: Another bold run is expected after a strong third last start. Rates highly.

selections.name: Estrellita
selections.reason: Racing consistently well recently and should be right in the finish from a good draw.

danger_horse.name: Kafuji Assam
danger_horse.reason: Expected to finish much closer today after a disappointing run last time.

selections.name: God Tesoro
selections.reason: Thereabouts last time and rates highly here. Expected to control the pace from the outset.

selections.name: Duckling
selections.reason: Recent form is very sound. Low draw and expected to go well after a dominant last-start win.

selections.name: Dragon Girl
selections.reason: Has the right credentials for this race. Strong place chance if she gets a clean break.

selections.name: Isabelle Soleil
selections.reason: Monbetsu transfer who showed good improvement last start. Winning prospects if she handles the track.

danger_horse.name: Bow Appears
danger_horse.reason: Has a strong chance with the aid of an inside alley. Can surprise.

selections.name: Oichinokata
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten last start after leading. Can improve again and looks the top choice.

selections.name: Queen's Mont Blanc
selections.reason: Can do much better today. Solid track record and expected to bounce back.

selections.name: Spartan World
selections.reason: Fitter for recent racing and is a genuine winning hope in this field.

selections.name: Gagne
selections.reason: Improvement is likely second-up. Rates as a strong each-way chance.

danger_horse.name: Total Dia
danger_horse.reason: Resuming after a break. Has run well fresh previously and can figure in the finish.

selections.name: Satono Sphere
selections.reason: One of the chief contenders. Excellent third last start and looks primed for a big run.

selections.name: Surf Galaxy
selections.reason: Hard to beat again after a dominant win last start. In superb form.

selections.name: Love Violet
selections.reason: Recent form is very sound. Can take this out with a clean run from the gate.

selections.name: Ho O Caesar
selections.reason: Scored a big 5-length win last start. Hard to beat again if he replicates that effort.

danger_horse.name: Harpy Cuore
danger_horse.reason: Impressed last start and is right in the mix again. Solid place value.

selections.name: Top Power
selections.reason: Last start winner who is in great form. Great chance to win again from a wide draw.

selections.name: Tabezakari
selections.reason: Made good headway last time to finish second. Rates as a major threat.

selections.name: Final Feliz
selections.reason: Can do much better today. Solid place record over this track and distance.

selections.name: Miya Iguazu
selections.reason: Drawn to enjoy a cosy run from an inside stall. Place chance.

danger_horse.name: Rimshot
danger_horse.reason: Better than recent moderate performances suggest. Could surprise at odds.

selections.name: Ibushigin
selections.reason: Leading contender coming out of a very nice alley. Hard to beat on recent form.

selections.name: Peak Bloom
selections.reason: Last start winner who is hard to beat again. Fitter now and rates highly.

selections.name: Candy Tuft
selections.reason: Capable of more and worth another chance in this field. Solid place hope.

selections.name: Hakusan Flash
selections.reason: Made good headway last time and has a top chance if she gets a clean run.

danger_horse.name: Parsifal
danger_horse.reason: Resumes today. Can run a good race despite the gap between runs.

selections.name: Cal Bay Cruise
selections.reason: In superb form and can get the job done again. The clear class horse of the race.

selections.name: Cash Blitz
selections.reason: Excellent second last start and can bounce back to winning ways here.

selections.name: Jun Firenze
selections.reason: Made good headway last time and rates as a strong each-way threat.

selections.name: Ever Since
selections.reason: Better than recent lacklustre performance suggests. Capable of a bold showing.

danger_horse.name: Flipper
danger_horse.reason: Likely to be attacking the line strongly. Place value.

selections.name: Metalcraft
selections.reason: Watch for sharp improvement today. Solid record over this track and distance.

selections.name: Cosmo Coronet
selections.reason: Progressing well and a win is on the cards soon. Rates highly.

selections.name: Shonan Raffine
selections.reason: Has the ability to be in the finish. Solid place chance.

selections.name: Brillo Dorado
selections.reason: Low draw and expected to go well. Each-way chance.

danger_horse.name: Yamori Atsumare
danger_horse.reason: Can do a lot better than last run. Capable of surprising at odds.
